title: Neo Enchant+
description:
Neo Enchant+ Introduces a new suite of enchantments Explore innovative ways to enhance your Minecraft experience. 
This new version now uses Minecraft's Data Driven Enchant. Play like Modding !
body:
# NeoEnchant+ V5 - Official Technical Enchant successor 
![https://uy64vwmxhf.ufs.sh/f/llTsukoqRt5QTmKu936JsdbAYGw6NoMQU1XkaVSh39xi5K8B](https://uy64vwmxhf.ufs.sh/f/llTsukoqRt5QTmKu936JsdbAYGw6NoMQU1XkaVSh39xi5K8B)

## Features :
- Support Enchanting table and anvil
- No performance consumption
- Modify enchantments as you wish.
- Available in Datapack format - And Mods format (Forge/NeoForge/Fabric/Quilt)
- JEI Support with "Enchantments Descriptions" Mods.
- Enchantement in creative menu
- 5 years of Patch Balancing and Huge fan base - Technical Enchant+ Official 307,000 views and TTE+ Rewened Fork by Frektip - 300.000 views

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Enchantment Configurator
Customize your adventure with our online enchantment configurator. Adjust enchantments according to your preferences, creating a unique experience that perfectly matches your playstyle, available at this address Enchantment Configurator. [Enchantments Configurator](https://labs.hardel.io/en-us/studio)

![Voxel Labs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/96b94bc1025a8fb968fa984717e80cf2402f8e59_0.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Documentation
For detailed information about **Yggdrasil, NeoEnchant, Whisper of Ethers**, or the web tools offered by Voxel, please refer to the documentation.
It contains all the information about the new content in Voxel, Enchantment, Structure, and everything else.

*Click on the image below to access the complete wiki. [Wiki Links](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)*

[![Documentation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/baeded70d64657f66ab232f72a442e77cb4ce387_0.webp)](https://hardels-organization.gitbook.io/voxel)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# The Neo-Ecosystem
With all these enchantments, the game might become too easy, right? That's why NeoEnchant+ isn't just a pack — it's an ecosystem.

- **[NeoEnchant+ Addons Structure](https://modrinth.com/datapack/neoenchant)** — All enchantments will be available in the enchantment table. Please note that this may result in significant imbalance.
- **[Yggdrasil](https://modrinth.com/datapack/yggdrasil-alternative)** — This pack **adds 20 structures included 5 mega structure** that take hours to explore. 
- **[BeyondEnchant](https://modrinth.com/datapack/beyondenchant)** — Breaks the chains of vanilla limits. Enchantment levels are increased, making them more powerful.
- **[Whisper of Ether](https://modrinth.com/mod/whisper_of_ether)** — Adds forgemagic to equipment, explore powerful weapons and armor perfect for combat!

![Packs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4c5e44f01c1ba289bdf22caa4174b986f7e0a46.webp)

![Delimeter](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c57c204c55df0ce5357df6501f616f2c7b7c6df1.png)

# Support the Project
Join us on Patreon and help make Minecraft an even more amazing experience for everyone!
With more support, I can make tools for creators, players, and modders. I plan to create the **Hytale asset editor in Minecraft!**

[![Patreon](https://images.ctfassets.net/4rnblstkg79m/5TumqlgINUoJBVWFRRU6wz/e64dfea04fe5b19e60fa27310114853f/WolffOlins_Patreon.jpg)](https://www.patreon.com/hardel)
